title: Collaboration-retrospective leaf evaluation front matter (R18; design.md §13)
description: Schema for the YAML front matter of one leaf cell `log/evaluations/<session>/<reviewer>.md`. The verbose prose body below the front matter is judged by a human reviewer, not by this schema; only its structure is single-sourced here so `tools/lint-evaluations` and `tools/check-evaluations` validate every leaf the same way.

session.description: The evaluated session's transcript filename stem (must equal the leaf's parent directory).

reviewer.description: The reviewer agent id (must equal the leaf's filename stem).

model_evaluated.description: The model that produced Claude's side of the evaluated session (R18.AC7), derived from the raw transcript — never assumed. Quote it in the YAML source: a mixed-model value contains a colon that breaks unquoted YAML.

grades.description: Per-party process/communication grades plus one consolidated overall grade. Requiring both parties here is what structurally guarantees a leaf covers both sides.

grade.description: The leaf grade vocabulary (log/evaluations/README.md). Deliberately non-numeric and non-ranking.
